title: OpenAI, Anthropic backer MGX raises one of the biggest AI funds ever as it closes at $49 billion
summary_full: The company is a backer of major AI companies including OpenAI and Anthropic, alongside Elon Musk's xAI, prior to its merger with SpaceX.
summary_public: The company is a backer of major AI companies including OpenAI and Anthropic, alongside Elon Musk's xAI, prior to its merger with SpaceX.
